Mid-Level Machine Learning Engineer
Cortex Health — Birmingham, UK (Hybrid)

About Cortex Health
Cortex Health is a healthtech company using AI to improve clinical decision support. Our models analyse patient records and imaging data to assist radiologists and oncologists with early detection.

The Role
We are looking for a Mid-Level ML Engineer to develop, deploy, and monitor machine learning models in production. You will bridge the gap between research prototypes and reliable, scalable inference services.

Responsibilities
- Train, evaluate, and deploy machine learning models using PyTorch
- Build and maintain ML pipelines with MLflow for experiment tracking and model registry
- Containerise models with Docker and deploy to FastAPI-based serving endpoints
- Implement data validation and monitoring for model drift detection
- Collaborate with data engineers to ensure clean, versioned training datasets
- Write comprehensive tests for model training and inference code

Requirements
- 2-4 years of experience in machine learning engineering or applied ML
- Strong Python skills with hands-on PyTorch experience
- Experience with MLflow or similar experiment tracking tools
- Proficiency with Docker for containerisation and local development
- Familiarity with FastAPI or Flask for building model serving APIs
- Understanding of ML fundamentals (gradient descent, cross-validation, overfitting)

Nice to Have
- Experience with healthcare or medical imaging data
- Knowledge of Kubernetes for orchestrating model deployments
- Familiarity with ONNX or TensorRT for model optimisation
- Experience with data versioning tools (DVC, LakeFS)

Salary: GBP 55,000 - 70,000
Remote Policy: Hybrid (2 days in office)
